options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -area
options.description: Area in which welltaps are to be inserted

options.name: -avoidAbutment
options.description: Specifies wether inserting avoids abutment in vertical and horizontal direction

options.name: -block_boundary_only
options.description: Specifies whether inserting termination cells on the core boundary

options.name: -bottom_termination_cell
options.description: Specifies the list of termination cells to be used at bottom

options.name: -cell
options.description: Cell to be used as welltap

options.name: -cellInterval
options.description: Distance from the center of one well-tap cell to the center of the following well-tap cell in the same row

options.name: -channel_offset
options.description: Specifies the offset value between taps and blockage in channel

options.name: -check_channel
options.description: insert well taps inside channel

options.name: -checkerBoard
options.description: Places welltaps in a checker-board fashion

options.name: -column_cell
options.description: Specifies the list of cells which can be replaced by termination cell

options.name: -fixCutCell
options.description: Fix all the instances which belong to wellCutCell list

options.name: -fixedGap
options.description: Ensures that the specified gap is always maintained

options.name: -inRowOffset
options.description: Specifies the distance between the first wellTap in a row and the start of the row

options.name: -incremental
options.description: Checks whether any instances of the cells specified in the list_of_cells are within 0.45 times the -maxGap or -cellGap from the next well-tap cell in the same row. If so, does not add well-tap cells at that location.

options.name: -insert_cells
options.description: Insert mixed well-taps, support LUP layer and boundary rule

options.name: -pitch
options.description: Specifies where welltaps could be placed if a wellTap cannot be inserted at cellInterval or maxGap

options.name: -pitchOffset
options.description: Specifies the offset value used for pitch calculation

options.name: -powerDomain
options.description: Power domain for which welltaps are to be inserted

options.name: -prefix
options.description: Prefix of welltaps to inserted

options.name: -safety_tmr
options.description: Places welltaps adjacent to the left & right edges of every tmr flop

options.name: -safety_tmr_insts
options.description: Specifies the list of instances required to place welltaps adjacently

options.name: -siteOffset
options.description: Specifies an offset value in number of sites so that the vertical taps need to be aware of

options.name: -skipRow
options.description: Specifies the number of rows to skip between two rows of an identical pattern.

options.name: -startRowNum
options.description: Specifies the row number starting from the from bottom or left side of the design on which the well-tap cells must be placed.

options.name: -termination_cell
options.description: Specifies the list of termination cells to be used

options.name: -top_termination_cell
options.description: Specifies the list of termination cells to be used at top

options.name: -vertical_boundary_spacing
options.description: Specifies vertical boundary spacing with well tap

options.name: -wellCutCell
options.description: Specifies the list of cells with the well cuts
